title: KT's Simple Waypoints
description: A simple waypoint mod that lets you create custom waypoints that show on your HUD
body: Simple Waypoints is a client-side Minecraft mod that allows players to add, edit, and delete waypoints in any world or server. It features a HUD overlay showing distance and direction to waypoints, a fully editable keybind for opening the GUI, and a toggle to enable or disable the overlay at any time, with all settings and waypoint data saved in different files based off the world/server.
